hero.title: Kufikapo
hero.lead: IATF yikukhumba kuti webusayiti iyi yiŵe yipusu kuŵazga, kweniso yikwendeskeka na kompyuta.
support: IATF yikugwiliskira nchito webusayiti kuti yiŵe yakufikapo. [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Cinthu cinyake ico cikovwira kuti vinthu viŵe vyambura kusuzga kuvipulikiska ni ivyo awo ŵakugwiliskira nchito vinthu ivi ŵakukumana navyo.

header.title: Lembani nkhani yakukhwaskana na umo mungapharazgira

paragraphs: Usange mwawona kuti pali suzgo pa webusayiti iyi, lembani ku:
Malipoti ghanyake agho ghangatovwira ni agha:
items: kasi mukagwiliskiranga ntchito kompyuta, panji pulogiramu ya pa kompyuta, usange ntchakukhumbikwa
report.footnote: Ntchakukhumbikwa yayi kulemba lipoti la kachilombo aka, kweni mungalongosora waka.

paragraphs: Nkhani zakukhwaskana na umo ŵanthu ŵangasangira mabuku ghithu zikulongosoreka mwakudumura mu kabuku kakulembeka na ŵanthu ŵanandi kuti munthu waŵawovwire.
Usange mu lipoti linu muli nkhani zaŵene, yowoyani mwakupulikikwa makora.
Webusayiti iyi njakudumura kuti yiŵe yichoko na yakukhazikika. Mabaibolo gha viyowoyero vinyake ghangaŵa kuti ghandalembeke makora apo tikunozgekera kuying'anamulira.
